purpose: The top-level structural wrapper for a SAPUI5 application. Contains a single Page or a navigation container of Pages. Provides theme context and app-wide services. Rarely visible directly — its content is what the user sees.
whenToUse: As the outermost node of a SAPUI5 spec — one App per application
When you need to compose multiple Pages with navigation between them
As a root theme/locale/CSRF context provider
In the plugin, as a pass-through frame that hosts the ShellBar + main content
whenNotToUse: For per-view layout — use Page or DynamicPage
As a child of other components — App is a root wrapper only
For modal overlays — those are placed at App level but are their own components (Dialog)
For screen-specific navigation — use FlexibleColumnLayout or SplitContainer inside App
doRules: Have exactly one App per application
Place ShellBar as the first child of App's page hierarchy
Keep the App itself content-free — it's a structural wrapper
Let child Pages handle their own layout
dontRules: Do not nest App inside another App
Do not put visible content directly on App — put it in a Page
Do not use App as a modal container — use Dialog for modals
Do not overload App with per-view logic — that belongs in Pages

requirements: Language attribute set on the html element it renders under
Focus management delegated to child Pages

forbiddenWith: Dialog as direct child (Dialog belongs at App level as overlay, not child)

exceptions: In our plugin, App renders as a pass-through frame that hosts ShellBar + content columns
